page.placeholder.title: This workspace is queued for a later MVP task
page.placeholder.copy: The current slice keeps this navigation available while backend services are built one task at a time.
skills.eyebrow: Manage local skill snapshots and project usage
skills.title: Installed Skills
skills.table.title: Installed Skills
skills.table.description: Local snapshots stored by Skills Manager and the projects that currently reference them.
skills.table.name: Name
skills.viewMode.label: List view mode
skills.empty.title: No installed skills
skills.empty.copy: Installed local snapshots will appear here after downloads are stored in the managed skill store.
skills.pagination.label: Skills pagination
skills.repositoryCheckError: Update check failed for {source} and affected {count} skills: {message}
skills.repositoryUpdateError: Update failed for {source} and affected {count} skills: {message}
skills.usage.title: {name} Usage
skills.usage.description: Project-only visibility for this managed snapshot.
skills.usage.summaryDescription: The managed snapshot stays in the central store. Projects only reference it.
skills.usage.projectsDescription: Each row shows whether the skill is enabled inside that project.
skills.usage.empty.title: No project usage yet
skills.usage.empty.copy: Add this skill to a project from the Projects page to activate it.
discover.title: Discover
discover.controls.title: Discovery source
discover.controls.description: Search reads live skills.sh data in the desktop app; browser preview keeps fixture fallback data.
discover.tabs.label: Discovery entry points
discover.search.label: Search remote skills
discover.search.placeholder: Search by name, tag, or source…
discover.install.title: Install from repository
discover.install.description: Install skills from a GitHub repository.
discover.install.skillNameHint: Specify the skill name to install (use * for all skills)
discover.install.success: {name} installed from {source}. Add it to a project from the Projects page when you want it active.
discover.install.successAll: {count} skills installed from {source}. Add them to a project from the Projects page when you want them active.
discover.results.title: Remote Skills
discover.results.description: Desktop results come from skills.sh and keep the same paginated table shape.
discover.table.name: Name
discover.empty.title: No matching skills
discover.empty.copy: Try another query or switch to Trending, Hot, or All.
discover.pagination.label: Discover pagination
settings.eyebrow: General management UI — never quite pretty enough
settings.title: Settings
settings.nav.label: Settings navigation
settings.update.title: App Update
settings.update.description: Check for and install application updates from GitHub.
settings.update.noUpdate: You are running the latest version.
settings.reconcile.title: Auto-Reconcile
settings.reconcile.description: When enabled, project skill, group, and CLI target changes can reconcile symlinks automatically.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.description: Choose the display language used by Skills Manager.
settings.language.applied: applied. Restart and the selected language package will be loaded on startup.
settings.language.note: Language files are loaded from public/locales. Add a JSON file and manifest entry to add another language.
settings.language.loadError: Language files could not be loaded. Built-in English and Chinese fallback is active.
settings.discoverPageSize.title: Global page size
settings.discoverPageSize.description: Control how many items each list page shows per page.
settings.discoverPageSize.label: Rows per page
settings.discoverPageSize.note: Applies to Discover, Skills, and Projects lists.
settings.discoverPageSize.invalid: Enter a page size between 1 and 100.
settings.startup.title: Startup
settings.startup.launchAtStartup.title: Launch at startup
settings.startup.launchAtStartup.descrip: Automatically start Skills Manager when your computer starts.
settings.startup.silentStart.title: Silent start
settings.startup.silentStart.description: Closing the window hides Skills Manager to the system tray. Use the tray menu to reopen or quit.
settings.adminRestart.title: Restart as administrator
settings.adminRestart.description: Administrator launch is enabled, but the current session is not elevated. Restart now with administrator privileges to keep symlink management working reliably.
settings.cliTargets.title: CLI Targets
settings.cliTargets.description: Added CLI target apps will be symlinked using relative paths.
settings.cliTargets.eyebrow: Software resolves paths via relative path; if a first-level directory exists, a skills directory is auto-created for symlinks
settings.cliTargets.empty.title: No custom CLI targets
settings.cliTargets.empty.copy: Add a project-relative target when you need something beyond the built-in agents, codex, or claude directories.
settings.cliTargets.table.title: CLI Targets
settings.cliTargets.table.name: Name
settings.cliTargets.form.description: Store a reusable project-relative path that projects can attach for skill symlink placement.
settings.cliTargets.form.name: CLI Target Name
settings.migration.title: Project-Only Migration
settings.migration.description: Run the one-time database migration that rewrites legacy link-mode data into the project-only model.
settings.migration.note: This runs the one-time database migration, creates a backup first, and reports any legacy global or custom skills that still need manual follow-up.
settings.migration.progress.label: Migration progress
settings.migration.progress.backupNote: Creating a safety copy of the current SQLite database.
settings.migration.progress.migrateNote: Applying the project-only schema and rewriting legacy records.
settings.migration.progress.reportNote: Collecting follow-up items and final migration counts.
settings.migration.completeNote: Project-only tables are now available. Review any manual follow-up items before continuing.
settings.migration.alreadyMigratedNote: This database already uses the project-only schema.
settings.migration.failedNote: No further changes were applied after the reported error. Fix the issue and run the migration again.
settings.migration.failedRecovery.permis: Check write access to the database folder and retry.
settings.migration.failedRecovery.backup: If a backup file was created, keep it until the migration succeeds.
groups.eyebrow: Define reusable skill groups to enable or disable skills in batch
groups.title: Skill Groups
groups.form.title: Create group
groups.form.description: Skill Groups collect reusable sets of managed skills.
groups.form.name: Group name
groups.deleteConfirm: Delete “{name}”? Attached projects keep their own project records and managed skills stay installed.
groups.table.title: Groups
groups.table.name: Name
groups.empty.title: No Skill Groups
groups.empty.copy: Create a reusable group, then attach it from the Projects page.
groups.pagination.label: Groups pagination
groups.detail.missing.title: Group not found
groups.detail.missing.copy: This group record could not be loaded. Return to the groups list and refresh the data.
groups.detail.title: {name}
groups.detail.description: Edit the reusable skill definition and inspect which projects currently attach it.
groups.skills.title: Included Skills
groups.skills.description: Select installed snapshots to include in this reusable group definition.
groups.skills.noneAvailable: All installed skills are already included in this group.
groups.skills.noneMatching: No skills match the current search.
groups.skills.moveToGroup: Move selected installed skills into the group
groups.skills.moveToAvailable: Move selected group skills back to installed skills
groups.usage.title: Project Usage
groups.usage.description: Group definitions are global. Attach and enable them from individual project detail pages.
groups.usage.projectsDescription: Each row shows whether this group is currently enabled inside that project.
groups.usage.empty.title: No project usage yet
groups.usage.empty.copy: Attach this group from a project detail page to make it available there.
projects.title: Projects
projects.form.title: Add Project
projects.form.description: Projects are the only activation boundary in the refactored model.
projects.form.name: Project name
projects.table.title: Projects
projects.table.name: Name
projects.empty.title: No projects yet
projects.empty.copy: Add a project root to start the project-only workflow.
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete “{name}” from Skills Manager? This does not delete the project folder.
projects.pagination.label: Projects pagination
projects.deleteDialog.title: Delete Project
projects.detail.title: Manage project activation
projects.detail.description: Attach skills and groups to this project while the CLI target flow is still being refactored.
projects.detail.missing.title: Project not found
projects.detail.missing.copy: This project record could not be loaded. Return to the projects list and refresh the data.
projects.detail.tabs.label: Project detail sections
projects.detail.skills.title: Project Skills
projects.detail.skills.description: Add already-downloaded skills directly to this project and control whether each one is active.
projects.detail.skills.unchanged: The selected skills are already attached to this project, so duplicate adds were skipped.
projects.detail.skills.dialog.title: Select Skills
projects.detail.skills.dialog.copy: Choose one or more skills to add to this project. Skills already attached stay checked and muted.
projects.detail.skills.dialog.empty: There are no installed skills to choose from yet.
projects.detail.skills.table.name: Name
projects.detail.skills.empty.title: No project skills
projects.detail.skills.empty.copy: Add one of the downloaded skills to start project-only activation.
projects.detail.groups.title: Project Groups
projects.detail.groups.description: Attach reusable group definitions to this project and control whether each group is active here.
projects.detail.groups.unchanged: The selected groups are already attached to this project, so duplicate attaches were skipped.
projects.detail.groups.dialog.title: Select Groups
projects.detail.groups.dialog.copy: Choose one or more groups to attach to this project. Groups already attached stay checked and muted.
projects.detail.groups.dialog.empty: There are no groups to choose from yet.
projects.detail.groups.table.name: Name
projects.detail.groups.empty.title: No project groups
projects.detail.groups.empty.copy: Attach a saved group to add its skill set into this project.
projects.detail.targets.title: CLI Targets
projects.detail.targets.description: Select which CLI target folders should receive skill symlinks inside this project.
projects.detail.targets.dialog.title: Select CLI Target
projects.detail.targets.dialog.copy: Choose a project-relative CLI target path to attach to this project.
projects.detail.targets.dialog.empty: There are no CLI targets available to add.
projects.detail.targets.addedBatch: {count} CLI targets added to the project.
projects.detail.targets.unchanged: No new CLI targets were selected.
projects.detail.targets.table.name: Target
projects.detail.targets.empty.title: No CLI targets
projects.detail.targets.empty.copy: Select at least one project-relative target so reconcile knows where to place symlinks.
skills.detail.missing.title: Skill not found
skills.detail.missing.copy: This managed snapshot could not be loaded. Return to the skills list and refresh the data.
skills.detail.summaryDescription: The managed snapshot stays in the central store. Projects only reference it.
skills.detail.workspaceDescription: Each row shows whether the skill is enabled inside that project.
skills.detail.fileTreeDescription: Browse the editable files inside this managed skill snapshot.
skills.detail.fileTreeEmpty.title: No editable files
skills.detail.fileTreeEmpty.copy: This snapshot does not expose any supported text files yet.
skills.detail.editorEmpty.title: Select a file
skills.detail.editorEmpty.copy: Choose a supported text file from the tree to inspect or edit it.
skills.detail.discardDialog.title: Discard unsaved changes?
skills.detail.discardDialog.copy: Switching files will discard the current unsaved edits.
skills.detail.leaveDialog.title: Leave skill detail?
skills.detail.leaveDialog.copy: You have unsaved edits in the current file.
error.symlinkPermission: Permission error: Unable to create symlink. Please run as administrator or enable Windows Developer Mode.
